title: CallLint Receipt
description: A local, verifiable CallLint receipt (calllint.receipt.v0). A receipt is a reporting layer derived from an existing ScanReport: it proves that a specific CallLint version produced a specific verdict over a specific normalized input under a specific policy and ruleset context. It does NOT prove runtime safety, certify a tool, or replace human review. See ADR 0028 and RECEIPTS.md.

schema_version.description: Receipt schema identity. Distinct from calllint.report.v0.

receipt_id.description: Random id (>=128 bits, base64url). Never timestamp-only; not hashed.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC creation time. Non-deterministic by design; not hashed.

version.description: CallLint version, read at runtime from the CLI package. Never hardcoded.

target.description: Config target label (scan) or action kind (action). Never an absolute local path.

verdict.description: Copied verbatim from the ScanReport aggregate verdict. UNKNOWN is never SAFE.

corpus.description: Optional corpus context copied from the report; informational only.

finding_refs.description: Lightweight references to findings in the report. Evidence stays in the report; the receipt only points at it.

trust_boundaries.description: CallLint's own behavior for this scan. Literal invariants, never inferred from the scanned target.

executed_target.description: CallLint never executes the server it judges.

network_used.description: false by default; true only when the scan ran under --online advisory mode.

secret_values_read.description: CallLint reads secret key shapes, never secret values.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature proving receipt provenance and integrity. Generated by cloud signing service (calllint scan --sign) or local development signing (calllint receipt sign). Absence of this field means the receipt is unsigned (local only). See ADR 0032.

algorithm.description: Signature algorithm. Only ed25519 supported in v1.0.

key_id.description: Key identifier for public key lookup (e.g., calllint-prod-2026-h2).

value.description: Base64url-encoded ed25519 signature (64 bytes, no padding = 86 chars).

signed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when signature was created.

public_key_url.description: Optional URL to fetch public key JSON. Defaults to https://calllint.com/.well-known/receipt-keys.json if omitted.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex sha256 digest, prefixed 'sha256:'. Produced by @calllint/fingerprint.
